title: Navneet Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Navneet Education is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navneet Education. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Subject Matter Expert to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About Navneet Education:
Navneet Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Support students with special educational needs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navneet Education!
